org.docgene.model

Class XMLRawHTMLArticle

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<org.docgene.model.Article>, org.docgene.model.Article, org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, org.docgene.model.HTMLOutput, XMLParent, XMLParentArticle

    public class XMLRawHTMLArticle
extends java.lang.Object
implements XMLParentArticle, java.lang.Comparable<org.docgene.model.Article>
    The element for a raw html article.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.Article

      Return the URL.

      Return true if the article has a separate ID.
      boolean hasPackage()
      Return true if the article has a package.
      boolean hasSearchableTitles()
      Return true if the article has searchable titles.
      boolean isDirect()
      Return true.
      boolean isInFrame()
      Return true if the article content is in a frame.

      Return true if the article title should keep the title description case.

      Return true.

      Return true if H1 titles must be skipped.

      Return true if if the article nav content must be removed.

    • Constructor Detail

      • XMLRawHTMLArticle

        public XMLRawHTMLArticle(java.lang.String id,
                         java.lang.String desc,
                         boolean keepCase)

      • XMLRawHTMLArticle

        public XMLRawHTMLArticle(java.lang.String id,
                         java.lang.String desc,
                         boolean keepCase,
                         boolean isConcurrent)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        id - the article id
        desc - the article description. The article getID() will be equal to its description
        keepCase - true if the article description should keep the title description case
        isConcurrent - true for concurrent parsing

        Return true if the article is valid. In this case it means that the associated URL was found and was a valid html document.

        title - the alternate title
        keepCase - true if the title description should keep the title description case

        true if the alternate title can be added
